title: clerodendrum myricoides var. savanorum
intro: Clerodendrum myricoides var. savanorum, a variety of the Clerodendrum myricoides plant, is a tropical plant species native to Central and South America, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum myricoides var. savanorum are said to include wound healing, pain relief, and the treatment of fever and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
